objective: Find the strongest viable pro-adoption or salvaged redesign path for 'Independent Model Inference Microservice Layer'.
evidence: C45 already separates route execution from model substrate through explicit execution modes.
C47 already supplies the path from leased cognition to native model families.
C36 already bounds any externally reachable service surface by membrane policy.

option_shapes.name: Reject As Already Subsumed
option_shapes.summary: Treat the idea as already mostly covered by C45 execution-mode split plus C47 native model adaptation.
option_shapes.main_upside: Avoids architectural churn and preserves the Alternative C posture.
option_shapes.main_risk: Leaves internal model-fleet scheduling and batching under-specified.

option_shapes.name: Inference Capacity Orchestrator
option_shapes.summary: Recast the idea as an internal sovereign subsystem for model pools, routing, batching, placement, and cost discipline beneath C45.
option_shapes.main_upside: Preserves the efficiency objective without reintroducing an externalized microservice plane.
option_shapes.main_risk: Must not duplicate C45 route governance, C47 adaptation authority, or C22 implementation ownership.

option_shapes.name: Direct-Spec Addendum
option_shapes.summary: Add pooled model-service semantics to C45 and C22 without creating a new subsystem.
option_shapes.main_upside: Closes the gap with less structural expansion.
option_shapes.main_risk: May overload C45 with fleet-management responsibilities.

recommended_next_action: Prefer a reframed internal orchestration/control-plane path over reviving the historical layer literally.
